query:
UPDATE drug_lens SET form = 
  CASE 
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%suppository%' OR LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%suppositories%' THEN 'Suppository'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%film-coated tablet%' THEN 'Film-Coated Tablet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%orodispersible tablet%' THEN 'Orodispersible Tablet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%effervescent tablet%' THEN 'Effervescent Tablet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%chewable tablet%' THEN 'Chewable Tablet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%tablet%' THEN 'Tablet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%hard capsule%' THEN 'Hard Capsule'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%soft capsule%' THEN 'Soft Capsule'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%capsule%' THEN 'Capsule'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%solution for injection%' THEN 'Solution for Injection'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%injection%' THEN 'Injection'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%solution for infusion%' THEN 'Solution for Infusion'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%infusion%' THEN 'Infusion'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%oral solution%' THEN 'Oral Solution'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%oral suspension%' THEN 'Oral Suspension'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%suspension%' THEN 'Suspension'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%syrup%' THEN 'Syrup'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%solution%' THEN 'Solution'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%cream%' THEN 'Cream'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%ointment%' THEN 'Ointment'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%gel%' THEN 'Gel'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%transdermal patch%' OR LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%patch%' THEN 'Patch'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%eye drops%' OR LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%ear drops%' THEN 'Drops'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%drops%' THEN 'Drops'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%nasal spray%' THEN 'Nasal Spray'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%spray%' THEN 'Spray'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%inhaler%' OR LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%inhalation%' THEN 'Inhaler'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%powder%' THEN 'Powder'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%sachet%' THEN 'Sachet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%lozenge%' THEN 'Lozenge'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%pessary%' THEN 'Pessary'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%enema%' THEN 'Enema'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%implant%' THEN 'Implant'
    ELSE NULL
  END;
